MEA002.rationale: Margin Expansion Opportunity. Kroger prices ($7.99) are higher than ours ($7.20) by 9.9%. A 11.0% surcharge captures margin while remaining competitive.

MEA001.rationale: Competitor pricing lower by 5%, small markdown recommended to stay competitive

DAI001.rationale: Minor price adjustment to match market position
